{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012006B9ECB707550F93BBCE69"}"},"total":314},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7503238269471130430","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，喜欢主角的绝对理智和神性，不在聊天群随意说话保持神秘感这一点就很赞，喜欢，几天看完80多章意犹未尽，希望后续无女主","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"聊天群","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420000693BBCE69%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227503238269471130430%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227476842651879214105%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747000264,"group_id":"7476842651879214105","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NynK6xxhpQb7jcmrLa7QKv+WcBtXCvzpOx+AbGyy3Meq","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/be042d4ef0394887ac589ebf3e70f467~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795724&x-signature=CErCPMSdek2egiUHKldzSzQkoYo%3D","user_id":"3804785767615543","user_name":"沁绫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3804785767615543","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476842651879214105","book_info":{"abstract":"【主神+聊天群+传播信仰+万界显圣+无敌+系统】
无缘无故穿越到超级恐怖的玄幻世界的陆景，居然身怀上古十大圣体之一的太阳圣体，凭借逆天的资质，陆景一路横推无敌手，在短短的3千年就修炼成神。
但是刚飞升神域，居然要被拉去挖矿，还好背后有人，这才避免了挖矿的命运。
可惜还没有等他享受到背后有人的好处，一场东西方神域的大战让神界的太一门全灭，只剩下几个真神境的独苗。
有感于神域的危险，大家商量着分了太一门的遗产，然后各自散伙另谋生路。
经过十亿年的刻苦修行，陆景终于成就了主神尊位。
“叮，诸天聊天群邀请您加入……”
